untranslatable_reason: The signal requires manual trendline drawing (highest high A to lowest low B with price not intersecting until after B), which cannot be expressed using only the provided technical indicators. The three-step method relies on visual trendline construction and price action relative to that custom trendline, not standard oscillators or moving averages. Pivot points were used as a proxy for support/resistance, but this is an approximation that does not capture the true signal logic.
translation_notes: This pattern fundamentally requires manual trendline identification and price action relative to that trendline across multiple bars. The entry conditions describe: (1) price close above trendline, (2) price test of low that fails to hold, (3) price recovery above intermediate high. Without a trendline drawing capability, only a partial translation using pivot-based support/resistance is possible. Recommend implementing custom trendline detection logic separately.
